location_precision.why: Every finding carries a usable file:line (e.g. `src/sync.py:14`, `src/report.py:11`).

interaction_synthesis.why: The report.py:5 finding notes handle leaks on "any exception in the loop" and report.py:11 identifies an AttributeError raised in that loop, but the write-up never explicitly connects the crash to the leak as a single compound failure.

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. "floor division drops the final partial page" and "Mutable default `seen=[]` is shared across calls, so IDs accumulated in one call cause legitimate users to be skipped."
